creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 239381
"git diff" patch to update the port

- Update 2.004 --> 2.005
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/Crypt-PKCS10/compare/2.004...2.005

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p5
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.0
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
